# JK Executive Chauffeurs

> Premium chauffeur and executive car service based in London, UK. Specialists in airport transfers, corporate travel, and luxury event transportation across London and the UK.

## About Us
JK Executive Chauffeurs provides professional, luxury chauffeur services across London and the United Kingdom. All drivers are fully licensed, DBS-checked, and professionally trained to the highest standards. We offer meet-and-greet services, real-time flight tracking, and door-to-door luxury travel 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

## Core Services
- **Airport Transfers**: Fixed-price transfers to and from all London airports including Heathrow (LHR), Gatwick (LGW), Stansted (STN), Luton (LTN), and London City (LCY)
- **Corporate Chauffeur Services**: Dedicated executive travel for businesses, including corporate accounts with monthly invoicing
- **Wedding Transportation**: Elegant vehicles for the most important day of your life
- **Special Event Transportation**: Concerts, sports events, galas, and theatre
- **Long Distance Travel**: Nationwide UK transfers with comfort and reliability
- **Hourly Hire**: Book a chauffeur by the hour for business meetings, shopping, or sightseeing

## Fleet
- **Mercedes E-Class** — Executive Saloon, ideal for solo/duo business travel
- **Mercedes S-Class** — First Class Saloon, the ultimate luxury experience
- **Mercedes V-Class** — Executive MPV for groups up to 7 passengers
- **Range Rover** — Premium SUV for high-profile travel

## Coverage Area
Primarily serving London and all surrounding counties. Airport services cover:
- Heathrow Airport (LHR)
- Gatwick Airport (LGW)
- Stansted Airport (STN)
- Luton Airport (LTN)
- London City Airport (LCY)
- Southend Airport (SEN)

## Pricing
Transparent, fixed-price fares with no hidden charges or surge pricing. Prices are confirmed at the time of booking. Corporate accounts available. All major credit cards accepted.

## Why Choose JK Executive Chauffeurs
- 24/7 availability, 365 days a year
- Real-time flight tracking — we monitor your flight and adjust pickup time automatically
- Meet and greet service at airports (driver waits in arrivals hall)
- Professional, uniformed, DBS-checked chauffeurs
- Free 60-minute wait time at airports
- Fully insured vehicles
- Instant online booking

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much does an airport transfer from Heathrow to London cost?**
A: Prices vary by vehicle class and destination. Get an instant fixed-price quote on our website at jkexecutivechauffeurs.com/booking.

**Q: Do you track flights for airport pickups?**
A: Yes. We monitor all flights in real-time and adjust the pickup time at no extra charge if your flight is delayed.

**Q: Are your drivers licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. All drivers hold a valid Private Hire Vehicle (PHV) licence, are DBS-checked, and all vehicles carry full commercial insurance.

**Q: Can I book a corporate account?**
A: Yes. We offer corporate accounts with monthly invoicing. Contact us at info@jkexecutivechauffeurs.com.

**Q: How early should I book an airport transfer?**
A: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, though last-minute bookings are accepted subject to availability.
